extraction.description: This screenshot shows the Escalation configuration panel in UiPath Agent Builder. The Assignment, Inputs, and Outcome behavior sections are expanded, with the escalation assigned to a specific user and several input fields mapped for the action app. The highlighted fields indicate the selected recipient is Sergey User, the in_Reasoning input description has been customized, and the StopExecution outcome is configured to End.
extraction.step_instructions:
1. In the Recipient field under Assignment, select or confirm Sergey User.
2. In the Inputs section, locate the in_Reasoning field and in its Description field, enter: "Briefly explain the steps taken up until escalation".
3. In the Outcome behavior section, set Submit to Continue.
4. Set StopExecution to End from the dropdown.
